programme.desc: It all started on the night of February 26 to 27, 2012. It was half past midnight when Stéphane Fournier arrived at the forest of Saint Lambert des Bois.

programme.title: The Case: A Predator of the Court (Véronique Béchu)
programme.desc: Véronique Béchu has handled hundreds of rape and incest cases. The protection of minors is its hobbyhorse. But the police commander will never forget one investigation.
programme.sub-title: A Predator of the Court (Véronique Béchu)

programme.title: The Case: Murder in the Vineyards
programme.desc: On December 6, 2012, Jean Aprin's lifeless body was found on his Roquebrussanne winery.

programme.title: The Case: The Hunt for Antonio Ferrara
programme.desc: The tale of a manhunt where phone taps, bates and snitches come and go.

programme.title: The Case: Murder at the Boarding School
programme.desc: In November 2011 Agnès Marin, 13, vanishes from her boarding school in the Cévennes.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 8
programme.desc: As a weather bomb hits, the chopper crew set out on one of the most challenging missions they have ever undertaken 20 miles off shore, a man lays face down at Muriwai beach unable to move.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 9
programme.desc: A hang glider pilot may have broken his back after a heavy crash-landing, a Manaia man is in a bad way after coming off a sea biscuit at high speed, and a crashed Waikato driver needs an urgent air-lift to hospital to save his life.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 10
programme.desc: A motocross rider may have broken his back after hitting a tree head on at high speed, at a sawmill a man faces its worse nightmares; and a woman is fighting for her life after taking an accidental overdose of her husband's medication.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 2
programme.desc: The emergency bikers risk their own lives as they race to save and protect others. In Birmingham the biker paramedics are on the frontline as they deal with the aftermath of football violence.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 3
programme.desc: Steve Harris finds himself under attack when he goes to the rescue of a teenager in a fight.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Trained to deal with anything, the biker paramedics find themselves dealing with a suspected stroke when a fishmonger collapses at market, a man’s hit crossing the road

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 6
programme.desc: There's a report of a stabbing for Birmingham's biker paramedics. In Essex, a driver tries to sweet talk his way out of trouble.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 7
programme.desc: New biker cop recruit PC Lucy Watson is on home turf in the seaside resort of Southend on Sea. From a suspect who does a runner to rowdy kids at night, she's got her hands full.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Biker paramedic Mark Hayes goes to the rescue of an RAF medic seriously ill on a platform at New Street Station and Steve Harris helps a pensioner who's had a nasty fall at market.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 9
programme.desc: A 9 year olds been knocked over on his way to school and biker paramedic SteveHarris finds himself on a canal boat. T

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 2
programme.desc: The biker cops continue their crack down on some of the busiest roads in the UK. Other motorcycle units are clearing some of the country’s most iconic scenic routes after too many thrills and spills.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 3
programme.desc: Paramedic Mark Hayes struggles to work out what’s wrong with a man collapsed on the bank of a canal and Steve Harris tends to a lady badly injured in a fall in the city centre.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 4
programme.desc: Essex biker cop PC Martin Ackers takes on illegal drivers and the bike squad crack down on drivers without seatbelts. And paramedic Steve Harris helps a woman to smile through the pain.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Essex biker cops clamp down on offences in the Christmas traffic. Paramedic Steve is called to a case of hypothermia and we meet the nation's blood bikers to discover their life-saving work.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Paramedic Mark Hayes responds to a stabbing and has to rescue a woman from a car crash who's on her way to her critically ill baby. The Emergency Bikers go head to head in a battle of biking skill.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 7
programme.desc: The bikers are back in action with the paramedics responding to emergency calls where a child’s been knocked over outside school, and a panic attack at Birmingham Moor Street station.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Biker cop Martin recreates the final moments of a motorcycle accident to find out what went wrong. And we meet a different kind of emergency biker rescuing marine mammals from Scotland’s beaches.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 9
programme.desc: Biker paramedic Mark Hayes comes to the aid of a man who has been hit by a bus. Paramedic Steve Harris tends to a man having a seizure. We meet the paramedics in Oxford called to a serious accident.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Steve Harris comes to the aid of a woman who has fallen head first down the stairs of a bus. Adrian is called to a house fire to rule out any foul play, and has to seize a car which is dangerous.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 12
programme.desc: PC Andy Stanley deals with a man suspected of driving whilst under the influence of drugs, and we meet the police off-road bikers who can take to the fields to pursue criminals.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 3
programme.desc: A mum breastfeeding her baby on the move rattles Essex biker cop Steve Clements and Lucy Watson is called as back-up to help deal with a man who’s reported to have been wielding an axe.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dam Breakthrough
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Team Scorpion must prevent a catastrophe when torrential rains create a large crack in a dam, threatening to wipe out an entire town in its wake.

programme.title: Scorpion: White Out
programme.desc: In order to save a United States Special Forces unit from certain death, Team Scorpion must brave the subzero temperatures of Antarctica.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sun of a Gun
programme.desc: Sylvester comes face to face with his estranged father who asks Team Scorpion for help.

programme.title: Scorpion: Da Bomb
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is helping with NASA's top secret rocket launch, but they must sabotage their own mission.

programme.title: Scorpion: Fractured
programme.desc: After a powerful earthquake rocks Los Angeles, Team Scorpion must fix a pinched gas line to prevent a massive explosion.

programme.title: Scorpion: Adaptation
programme.desc: While Team Scorpion works to stop an influx of drugs being smuggled into the country via drones, Walter gives Happy and Toby an ultimatum on their new relationship.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Fast & The Nerdiest
programme.desc: After Sylvester scores big on THE PRICE IS RIGHT, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a high-end car smuggling operation about to ship bioweapons to South America.

programme.title: Scorpion: Ticker
programme.desc: When Los Angeles' blood supply is hacked and deemed unusable because of fear it's been tainted, Team Scorpion must find the culprit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: While on a secret mission in Djibouti, Africa, with his new Homeland protege, Tim Armstrong (Scott Porter), Cabe is captured and Team Scorpion must save him.

programme.title: Scorpion: Twist And Shout
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's mission to recover the remains of fallen Marines in Vietnam is threatened along with their lives when a deadly tornado heads directly towards them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Hard Knox
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is hired by the Department of Defense to break into Fort Knox and "steal" a precious artifact in order to test their security.

programme.title: Scorpion: Chernobyl Intentions
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes to Chernobyl to repair the decaying nuclear reactor before a catastrophic meltdown.

programme.title: Scorpion: Toby Or Not Toby
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must out-think their unstable ex-Scorpion member after he kidnaps Toby and threatens to kill him unless his cunning demands are met.

programme.title: Scorpion: Civil War
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must put aside their personal and romantic predicaments when anonymous hackers with unknown motives take control of U.S. military aircraft and warships and point weapons at American cities.

programme.title: Scorpion: And More Civil War
programme.desc: Just as Team Scorpion makes headway against the hackers controlling U.S. naval destroyers, they learn that a U.S. nuclear submarine also has been hacked and has a missile about to launch.

programme.title: Scorpion: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You
programme.desc: When Walter is accidentally launched into space in a rocket, he hallucinates about Paige as his oxygen runs low, and Team Scorpion works feverishly to find a way to bring him home before he suffocates.
programme.sub-title: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You

programme.title: Scorpion: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must find a boy from Ralph's class who goes missing on a field trip after he accidentally has a run-in with a deadly criminal. Also, Toby gets closer to finding out the identity of Happy's husband.

programme.title: Scorpion: Plight At The Museum
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's simple job at the Los Angeles Natural History Museum turns deadly when they discover thieves robbing a rare gem exhibit in order to get materials needed to enrich a nuclear bomb.

programme.title: Scorpion: Bat Poop Crazy
programme.desc: Before Halloween, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a deep, vast cave system in order to prevent a bat population from destroying the North America ecosystem.

programme.title: Scorpion: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote
programme.desc: On Election Day, as democracy hangs in the balance, Team Scorpion is called on when someone tries to throw the U.S. presidential election into chaos.
programme.sub-title: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote

programme.desc: In Michigan, 1996, a body is found on the side of a road, wrapped in a blanket. The victim is Sharon Hammack. Detectives use new technology in an attempt to solve this cold case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When a young woman is out for a run she is brutally attacked and raped by a stranger. Police use groundbreaking genetic genealogy to identify the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Salt Lake City, 2010, Sherry Black is found stabbed to death in her bookshop. Police fail to identify her killer until advanced DNA science reignites the case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1976 Wisconsin, 25-year-old David Schuldes and 24-year-old Ellen Matheys are murdered in a park. The case goes cold until 2015 when new DNA science is found.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Police solve the decades-old cold case of Clare Holman through new advancements in DNA technology.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1976, 19-year-old Janet Stallcup goes missing while on her way to a party. Eight days later, her body is found in her car.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1978, the body of 16-year-old Krisann Baxter is found in Washington. Investigators try to find Krisann's killer, but don't find any answers.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1989, Krista Martin's life is tragically cut short because of an intruder. A friend finds her and calls 911, starting an investigation that will span four decades.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In Chandler, Arizona in 1991, an intruder viciously sexually assaults a woman in her own home. The case goes unsolved for decades until revolutionary science connects the dots.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1995 in Beaumont, Texas, the parents of Catherine Edwards find her body in her bathroom. The killer evades justice, that is, until forensic science catches up with him.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Will a new forensic science tool find the killer of Cathy Sposito, murdered on an Arizona hiking trail in 1987?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1986, Barbara Carr was killed in a home invasion, while her husband escaped. New science may finally unearth a suspect.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder in 1991, will determination and forensic tools find Danielle Clause's killer?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: A woman's skeletal remains are found in Okaloosa County in 1994. It sparks a years-long search for her identity and killer, until a new forensic tool provides answers.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: A young woman is found beaten to death in the snow of rural Wisconsin in 1984. The killer evades detection of the police for decades. How will a breakthrough in DNA testing methods reveal the killer's identity?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When mother Mary Davis is found murdered, the case spans decades. Bleeding edge forensics could hold the answers.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Serial rapes spur fear in a city in North Carolina. Years later new forensic science finds the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Rookie Blue: On The Double
programme.desc: When Gail Peck’s uniform is stolen, the rookies go after a vigilante who is impersonating a police officer. Meanwhile, Swarek’s off the grid, trying to get information out of former crime enforcer Jamie Brennan

programme.title: Rookie Blue: God’s Good Grace
programme.desc: While Swarek is brutally interrogated by Jamie Brennan in the basement of a Pickering farmhouse, the rookies help Andy solve a mystery that may reveal Swarek’s location

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: When a mysterious young girl vanishes from the scene of a multi-car accident, Andy McNally connects the girl to a 7-year-old cold case.
programme.sub-title: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Class Dismissed
programme.desc: As local high schools wind to a close for summer, dangerous pranks abound – including the theft of an armed police car. While tracking down the stolen vehicle, Andy and Swarek pick up the trail of a volatile teen boy

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Good Shoot
programme.desc: Dov Epstein happens upon a convenience store robbery-in-progress that results in him shooting a young black teenager.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Girl’s Night Out
programme.desc: On Traciʼs first day as a detective, all hell breaks loose when a carload of girls from a bachelorette party hits another vehicle, killing the driver. Jerry discovers that the driver of the parked car was dead before the accident.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Messy Houses
programme.desc: While answering a domestic disturbance call, Andyʼs personal life is turned inside out when the social worker on the scene turns out to be her estranged mother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Coming Home
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe -- a homeless squatter whoʼs been stabbed in the warehouse

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: When a gifted psychic - or, at the very least, a gifted conman - enters 15 Division to help find the missing witness in an organized-crime case, the officers are forced to come face-to-face with some of the hidden truths

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a grad-student-turned escort, the officers discover a pattern of missing women. Since Gail fits the physical description of the victims, she is sent on an undercover sting at a high-end hotel

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Out Of Time
programme.desc: After the officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator, the grim discovery of the body of a missing girl reopens an unsolved case – bringing back Detective Luke Callaghan in from the Homicide Squad to oversee it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Cold Comforts
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are still reeling in the aftermath of the unexpected death of one of their colleagues. When they discover that a laptop has been stolen containing sensitive information, they set out to tie up several of open cases

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Rules
programme.desc: Itʼs “back to basics” for 15 Division when Staff Sergeant Frank Best decides itʼs time for his officers to get back on track

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Every Man
programme.desc: A seasonʼs worth of trials and tribulations come to a head during a frenzied night at the station when the distracted rookies improperly search a prisoner

programme.title: Rookie Blue: I Never
programme.desc: When a violent child abductor escapes from an emergency hospital visit, 15 Division goes on the hunt for the criminal -- only to discover that heʼs taken another young victim

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Surprises
programme.desc: After six months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick, then Andy go missing. Meanwhile, a random arrest at 15 Division puts Sam Swarek and the other officers in the middle of the investigation-turned-rescue-mission

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex convict determined to get his old life back at any cost. Andy realizes just how much has changed since she walked away from her old life six months ago

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Different, Not Better
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz. When they come face-to-face with an out of control EDP [Emotionally Disturbed Person], their differences are put to the test and one of them has to pull the trigger.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: Andy has her sights set on a much-needed long weekend. But when a routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car, Andy and Gail must convince him that no heartache lasts forever

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together. Meanwhile, 15 Division springs into emergency response mode in order to get the contaminated drugs off the streets before a deadly outbreak sweeps through the city.

programme.title: Knowing
programme.desc: A professor (Nicolas Cage) and his son obtain an encoded time-capsule document that lists every major disaster over the past 50 years and predicts a future global calamity.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: On the run from a Detroit crime boss, an ex-con and his adopted brother use a high-tech gun to battle an army of thugs and two heavily armored, futuristic soldiers who want their weapon back.

programme.title: Automata
programme.desc: During a routine investigation involving robot manipulation, an insurance agent (Antonio Banderas) at a robotics company makes a discovery that has profound consequences for the human race.

programme.title: Knowing
programme.desc: A professor (Nicolas Cage) and his son obtain an encoded time-capsule document that lists every major disaster over the past 50 years and predicts a future global calamity.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: On the run from a Detroit crime boss, an ex-con and his adopted brother use a high-tech gun to battle an army of thugs and two heavily armored, futuristic soldiers who want their weapon back.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The officers of Division 15 work to track down Ted McDonald; but even after catching him, they realize Ted has more targets set to explode out there.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy and Sam return to work; Andy is attacked at Traci's apartment and the Sex Crimes Unit tries to take over the case.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy contemplates her future with Sam after learning of heartbreaking news; she meets a teenager in need of protection.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A riot erupts at an over-capacity women's correctional facility while Andy, Juliet, Nick and Gail transfer inmates; a dangerous prisoner tries to prove her innocence to a trapped Andy and Juliet.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Nick receives information on his tragic past and goes off the grid to track someone down; he is forced to tell Juliet about his secrets.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Officers from 15 Division race to find Traci after she fails to show up for a raid involving a notorious gun dealer.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A community outreach baseball game is interrupted by a drive-by shooting; Sam plans a getaway with Andy.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Sam and Andy are determined to clear Oliver's name after discovering he is the prime suspect in the evidence room bombing.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When it is not known if aliens headed to Earth are friend or foe, five people are placed in secret bunkers to man switches that, if not pressed at specified intervals, will set off mass destruction that will destroy everything, alien or human alike.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Engaged as soldiers on a distant planet to prevent a race of alien bugs from stealing minerals that provide the Earth's energy, a woman (Christine Elise) and her troops accidentally discover that the real enemy may not be the aliens at all.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When a seemingly harmless audio signal from space causes physiological changes in Earth's youth, a young scientist races against time to discover what exactly is happening and why. Could the changes be necessary for the survival of the planet?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A despondent man finds himself torn between killing himself and killing his co-workers. Before he can do either, he's pulled into The Outer Limits where there are hundreds of versions of him, each with a different life and a different character.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A woman's life changes dramatically when she accidentally shoots herself in the head which causes her to not only grow more intelligent, but also to realize how dull her life was before the photo in a picture frame started talking to her.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When an incident at a space station leaves three people dead, the captain of the ship returns to Earth to face murder charges. Is the captain a murderous madman? Or has he actually seen the face of evil floating in the zero-gravity of deep space?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: The residents of a suburban neighborhood have their lives turned upside down when a four block section of their subdivision is ripped from the earth by a mysterious force and transported to a distant planet. David McCallum and Laura Harris star.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Muckraking TV journalist Donald Rivers (Alan Thicke), host of The Whole Truth, has the show of a lifetime: rock solid-proof that the government and private defense contractors have been engaging in secret genetic cloning.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Using an experimental treatment, a scientist (Pat Morita) helps an aging athlete (Adrian Pasdar) end his career on a high note by accelerating his reflexes for one last match. But with victory comes side-effects...courtesy of The Outer Limits.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: In a society controlled by aliens, a mother rebels when she is forced to give up her child to Mother, a wise alien who acts as a parent to all infants. Determined to get the child back, she embarks upon a dangerous quest that will change her world.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Two brothers wrestle for control of their father's million-dollar pharmaceutical company. But when one brother discovers a drug which may hold the secret to eternal life, the battle for control becomes a rapid trip toward self-destruction.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A dying race of aliens come to Earth to stop its own extinction…by reanimating human corpses. But a government doctor (Mykelti Williamson) senses that there may be more to their plans than mere survival! D. W. Moffett and Rae Dawn Chong also star.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: An experiment at St. Peter's Hospital threatens the natural order of things when an embittered billionaire (William Hickey) pays a brilliant cardiologist (Bruce Davidson) to help him cheat death. But is death willing to be cheated so easily?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Aggie (Thora Birch) is an outcast at her elementary school because strange things seem to happen around her. When she is suspended from school, her parents hire a nanny who seems too good to be true. Will they lose their only child to keep her safe?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When a college student (Josh Brolin) experimenting with time travel takes a job with a prestigious lab, he doesn't realize that the lab's billionaire owner understands completely the financial and political benefits of seeing into the future.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When Father Anton, a priest who has been questioning his faith, stumbles and hits his head, he suddenly begins to see demons all about him. When those demons bestow upon him the power over life and death, he uses it…but nothing comes without a cost.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When Sharon Rosman's son is abducted his 6-year-old sister is the only witness but is far too traumatized to speak. When psychologist John Holland comes to work with the young girl, she tells him it was the boogeyman…from under the bed.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Dropped out of space by a chunk of dark matter, pilot Paul Stein (John Heard) discovers a derelict ship lost ten years ago with all hands, including his long-lost brother. Only it seems that the crew may not quite be dead…or alive.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Henry Marshall (Frank Whaley) is a greedy man. Recently released from prison, Marshall has learned little from his experiences. But an encounter with alien beings (Rebecca De Mornay and John Savage) may just teach him a thing or two.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When a group of astronauts returning to Earth after an expedition to Mars discovers what appears to be a dangerous alien life form on their ship, they must decide whether to return to Earth or sacrifice themselves for the sake of all humanity?

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Belgian UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Belgian UFO, (Pts. 1 & 2), UD: I.D. Swap, Brenda's Fire and Philip Breen & UD.

programme.title: Alien Agenda: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Alien Agenda Planet Earth reveals the shocking truth about UFOs and Extraterrestrials, a truth that has been suppressed and hidden for centuries.

programme.title: Alien Paranormal: Bigfoot, UFOs and the Men in Black
programme.desc: Are Bigfoot creatures traveling to earth in UFO's, and being covered-up by Men in Black? Experience terrifying, real events as documented by top authorities, including: Aliens attacking a house; Alien Abductions to create a hybrid race; vortexes and more!

programme.title: 27 Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Strange and bizarre UFO encounters abound, but recent Alien encounters by highly credible eyewitnesses are so unusual and perplexing that they challenge our understanding of physics and the Universe as we know it.

programme.title: Deep Sea Aliens
programme.desc: Explore the mysteries of the deep sea: underwater anomalies, alien abductions, USOs, and unexplained cases that defy our understanding.

programme.title: Aliens Against Nuclear War : Edgar Mitchell
programme.desc: 12 moonwalkers claim ET visited Earth, govt covered it up. Aliens stopped nuclear war. Crazy or worth hearing more?

programme.title: Alien Crash at Roswell
programme.desc: The most enigmatic UFO incident in history exposed. Join Philip Coppens, star of History Channel's "Ancient Aliens" series in this and unprecedented expose on the Roswell Incident revealing that there is much more to this case than previously believed.

programme.title: The Witnesses :Ancient Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Contactee, sighter, and abductee share similar and different experiences with beings from other dimensions, leaving a lasting mark of their presence.

programme.title: UAP: Death of the UFO
programme.desc: When Project Blue Book was terminated, the military vowed that they were no longer investigating the phenomena. However it was revealed that the Pentagon was conducting a program on UFOs and UAPs.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: Ever since Roswell, observers have noted that UFOs allegedly appear in locations that are already full of secrets and mystery: namely, weapons labs. The question is, why?

programme.title: Project Serpo
programme.desc: 2005: Ex-agent unveils 3,000-page report on a secret ET exchange mission to planet Serpo

programme.title: Ancient Alien America
programme.desc: Native cultures have handed down shocking accounts for generations of Aliens from other worlds visiting Earth in the ancient past and their involvement with them.

programme.title: UFOs Over Phoenix: Confessions of a 911 Operator
programme.desc: An infamous mass sighting of a colossal UFO has taken an interesting turn as two new witnesses have come forward with new revelations about the V-shaped objects flying over the Arizona sky.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: In 1956, an object was detected over the North Sea heading toward Bentwaters RAF base--a base with nuclear weapons.

programme.desc: A beautiful looking sports car has been fooling the punters and intriguing Derek. It's a Challenger E-Type, a fibreglass replica created from an E-Type mould.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul and Jack head to Staffordshire to pick up five vehicles from collector Rob's colossal barn, including a Mini and a Morris Minor.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave's in Lincolnshire picking up a 1935 Riley Falcon - a good-looking saloon car, with a pre-select gearbox.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek brings a small army of military hardware to Thornton-le-Dale, including a Studebaker Weasel tracked vehicle and a WWII-era Willys Jeep.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul collects a cherished 1924 Rover 9 that's been in the same family since the 1950s and only had one previous owner before that.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Sunderland to pick up a real Italian beauty: a 1972 Lancia Fulvia Zagato. Red and racy, the car has seen better days, but Derek's still impressed.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Up for sale at the Mathewson's auction is a 1275 Mini GT that hails from just down the road and could be a future British icon.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek travels to the Lancashire coast to pick up a rare 1972 Citroën SM, and Dave is on HQ duties and admires a Punto that's two decades old but has just 42 miles on the clock.

programme.desc: A crumbling hill in the Peak District and dunes in California caused the closure of two roads, and a route used by the French Resistance that shut in 2003.

programme.desc: The desert town that faced a disaster of biblical proportions. Plus, vast coastal ruins that reveal a past once wiped from history.

programme.desc: A marooned ironclad structure off the coast of England that hides a dramatic story of war and resilience, and a facility in America that helped tear apart a nation.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Forgotten relics from the defence of America's homeland, concealed by the banks of the Mississippi, and a concrete behemoth on the French coast that proved invulnerable.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An American prison for the violent and deranged with links to an infamous cult leader, and a cavernous tunnel network in France offering shelter from unrelenting bombardment.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An Albanian village home to Allied secret agents, devastated for resisting the Nazi war machine, and a notorious asylum in America that enforced lobotomies on a terrifying scale.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Finding out what happened to an infamous pirate city in Jamaica. Also, a grim gulag in Croatia and a Louisiana plantation caught up in the aftermath of the American Civil War.

programme.title: Great British Landmark Fixers
programme.desc: After many decades, Manchester Town Hall is in urgent need of repairs. A dedicated team of expert engineers and craftsmen work to restore this architectural wonder to its former glory.

programme.desc: Crews from West Midlands Ambulance Service attend a diabetic who has collapsed at home, reassure the wife of a man with heart problems and keep up the spirits of a woman with womb cancer.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedics treat a young mum with severe stomach pains, take a breathless pensioner to hospital and attend an elderly lady with dementia whose nose will not stop bleeding.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry and June experience problems with 'industrial relations' when they have new wardrobes fitted in their bedroom.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: While on a train journey, Terry manages to knock himself unconscious helping a lady retrieve her luggage.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: The chance of a bargain second-hand camera re-kindles Terry's interest in photography, but when he takes a portrait of his boss, it's up to June to extricate him from a sticky situation.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry buys a video recorder, but disaster strikes when he offers to record a programme for the company chairman.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry learns of the death of Uncle Charlie and attends the funeral with June. He is given Uncle Charlie's ashes to scatter but due to a mix-up he gets arrested when sniffer dogs lead the police to mistake the ashes for drugs.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: A mishap with a new oil portrait of Sir Dennis leads to a staged break-in at Malcolm's house.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry tries to ingratiate himself with his boss by volunteering June's services as tea-maker to the cricket team.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry and June decide to take action when Lola the office vamp turns her attention to Sir Dennis, eclipsing the less glamorous, but devoted, Miss Fennel.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: When June decides to have new front doors, Terry is burdened with the task of purchasing the right one.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Having begun a fitness and diet regime, Terry is shocked when he believes he overhears the doctor, on the telephone, saying that he is terminally ill.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: A clock goes missing and, coincidentally, a tramp is found sleeping in Terry's shed, but is it safe to jump to conclusions?

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: After an accident involving a refuse cart, Terry decides to defend himself in court, but his bumbling nature soon sees justice undone.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: When the vicar and Mrs Dingle decide to reopen the youth club, they enlist Terry's help to assemble a ping-pong table. The instructions should be idiot-proof, but whoever wrote them had not taken Terry into account.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In late 1992, an attack led to an investigation which would last nearly a quarter of a century. Over time, DNA profiling helped to close a case which detectives feared would never be solved.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: David Jackson left his home to buy beer and cigarettes. He was never seen again. For 15 years his disappearance remained unsolved, until one investigator broke the case wide open.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The murder of Lynette White led to the longest murder trial in British history at the time. Find out how police work and DNA eventually led police to her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Rachel O'Reilly was savagely murdered in her home, in what looked like a burglary gone wrong. A ground-breaking investigation finally put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of the violent murder of Dr John Yelenic, and how the investigation into his death became one of the most infamous and shocking in Pennsylvania state history.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Exploring some of the most startling criminal cases of the past two decades where technology has changed the course of the investigations.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When police investigated a brutal murder, false claims of guilt nearly derailed the investigation, but the victim's family never gave up trying to find the killer.
programme.sub-title: The Murder of Beverley Ann Dyke

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 22nd December 1979, Phyllis Murphy disappears after doing some Christmas shopping. When she doesn't come home, her family fear the worst, but it's not until a month later in the Wicklow Mountains that her body is discovered.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 28th February 2001, the body of a woman was found at the bottom of the stairs of her home in North Dublin, Ireland. What initially looked like an accident, soon turned into a murder investigation.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In January 1992, when an estate agent went missing, both police and her family feared the worst. For 25-year-old Stephanie Slater, it was the start of an 8-day ordeal defined by torture and terror.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 17th September 2006, emergency services were called to a blaze in Pinyon Pines. A house was engulfed in flames and three burned bodies were discovered inside. It soon became clear this was no accident.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The Fridge Killer follows the investigation into a truly spine-chilling murder in Nevada, that led police to uncover a serial killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A popular, healthy, 60-year-old woman suffered a sudden, painful death. Detectives managed to trace the killer, despite their calculated and elaborate web of deceit.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A killer, who stalked and gained his victim's trust, enticed her to her death. Almost two decades later scientific advances brought the perpetrator to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A man returning from a family visit stops to help what appears to be a stranded group on the Belt Parkway in Brooklyn, NY. Half an hour later, he is found dead.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Laura Garza told friends she was going on a night out at the Marquee Club. When she didn't show for work the next day a search ensued to find her as well as the men she left with.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Mary Ann Perez left a bar just outside of New Orleans. Early the next morning, her family received a call from an anonymous woman, mentioning Mary had run into car trouble. She never returned home.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of the tragic murder of Brett Wentworth, how police tracked his killer down and how advanced forensic technology was key to solving the case.

programme.title: South Park starts at 9pm
programme.desc: CHANNEL STARTS AT 9PM Follow everyone's favorite troublemakers—Stan, Kyle, Cartman, and Kenny--from the very beginning of their unforgettable adventures.

programme.title: South Park: Hotter Than Summer: Marjorine
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: Follow That Egg: In a bid to prevent Mr. Slave from marrying Big Gay Al, Mrs. Garrison forces the children to help him in an experiment to prove that gay marriages are unstable. (S9. E10)

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Kids
programme.desc: Ginger Kids: After giving a hate speech against 'the gingers', Cartman awakens the next day with a case of 'Gingervitus' and soon rallies against the persecution of his fellow red heads. (S9, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Free Willzyx
programme.desc: Free Willzyx: The boys are tricked into believing the killer whale at Sea Park is from the moon. How will Timmy's wheelchair, the Russian government and their skateboards help to free him? (S9, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Bloody Mary
programme.desc: Bloody Mary: Randy is arrested for drunk driving and must attend AA, where he is told he is powerless to control himself. Maybe the bleeding Virgin Mary statue can perform a miracle or two? (S9, E14)

programme.title: South Park: The Return of Chef
programme.desc: The Return of Chef: The boys notice that Chef is acting weird after returning from the 'The Super Adventure Club'. Why is he trying to seduce them? Can a trip to a strip joint help? (S10, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Smug Alert: Kyle's father buys a new hybrid car but it's not long before his smug levels reach ridiculous levels - must be time to move to San Fran! How will Cartman deal with no Kyle? (S10, E02)

programme.title: South Park: A Million Little Fibers
programme.desc: A Million Little Fibers: Towlie writes his memoirs and it's not long before he's invited onto The Oprah Winfrey Show. (S10, E05)

programme.title: South Park: ManBearPig
programme.desc: ManBearPig: Ex U.S. Vice President Al Gore visits South Park Elementary and warns the pupils about ManBearPig, a monster which is "half man, half bear and half pig" - you can't be "cereal"! (S10, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Tsst!
programme.desc: Tsst: Cartman's mum realizes she can no longer control him, so attempts to get help from various reality TV experts. Only when she recruits the "Dog Whisperer" do results start to happen. (S10, E07)

programme.title: South Park: Make Love, Not Warcraft
programme.desc: Make Love, Not Warcraft: The boys are all shades of mad when a 'griefer' repeatedly kills them in an online game. Some serious training is in order so they can defeat him and play the game! (S10, E08)

programme.title: South Park: Mystery of the Urinal Deuce
programme.desc: Mystery of The Urinal Deuce: Someone defecates in a urinal at school! Cartman rants that it's a conspiracy "like 9/11!" The entire town think so too! Time for a trip to the White House. (S10, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Hotter than Summer: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy
programme.desc: Miss Teacher Bangs A Boy: Power goes to Cartman's head when he becomes "Dawg the Hallway Monitor". Meanwhile, Kyle is shocked to discover his little brother Ike and his teacher are at "it"! (S10, E10)
programme.sub-title: Hotter than Summer: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy

programme.title: South Park: Hell on Earth 2006
programme.desc: Hell On Earth 2006: Satan has a Sweet 16 style party in L.A. on Halloween! The gang perform a ritual and manage to summon Biggie Smalls - who demands Butters helps him get to the party! (S10, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go (Part 1)
programme.desc: Go God Go (1): Cartman is impatient to get his hands on the latest games console. Result? A visit to the atheistic future of 2546! Richard Dawkins pays a visit to South Park Elementary. (S10, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII (Part 2)
programme.desc: Go God Go XII (2): Cartman is stuck in the future, caught up in a battle between atheists and sea otters! And what will become of Richard Dawkins and Mrs. Garrison's love affair? (S10, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Stanley's Cup
programme.desc: Stanley's Cup: In a parody of underdog sports films, Stan is sentenced to community service and ends up coaching the Park County Pee-Wee hockey team - can he turn these losers into winners? (S10, E14)

programme.title: South Park: With Apologies to Jesse Jackson
programme.desc: With Apologies to Jessie Jackson: Randy faces public ridicule for using the "N" word on live TV. Cartman can't resist teasing a little person who comes to school to teach about prejudice. (S11, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Hotter Than Summer: Cartman Sucks
programme.desc: Cartman Sucks: After being caught in a compromising position with Eric, Butters is sent to a special camp to "Pray the Gay Away". Cartman tries to retrieve the incriminating photo. (S11, E02)

programme.title: A Haunting: Field Of Ghosts
programme.desc: For as long as she can remember, Markie Beason has sensed something horrible happened in her home and becomes frightened to be alone in the house. Her father David, reaches out to a paranormal investigation group in hopes they can bring peace to the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunting of Summerwind
programme.desc: Ginger moves her family into an old mansion. A supernatural presence torments her husband.

programme.title: A Haunting: Casa de los Muertos
programme.desc: Eddie Benitez fears the spirit of a dead man who committed suicide is slowly killing his son.

programme.title: A Haunting: Angels And Demons
programme.desc: Maryland single Mom Kathie Sheats hopes life will change for the better when she marries her boyfriend Brian. But "something" inside her house has other ideas. Spiritual warfare literally breaks out...taking over Kathie's mind, body and soul.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghostly Voices
programme.desc: Angelina Balistreri believes her home is haunted by a harmless ghost, while her husband, Emiliano, is skeptical of the paranormal. They call in a priest and medium who makes contact with a troubled ghost and helps him cross over and find peace.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Protector
programme.desc: A mother and daughter both believe their house is haunted. But while the mother believes it's the spirit of her murdered boyfriend, her daughter believes it's much darker. Paranormal experts investigate and uncover an epic battle between good and evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Strange sounds and eerie sensations lead Charles Gonzales to suspect that a spirit haunts his Florida home. Charles asks Desiree to investigate his home. There, Desiree encounters the vicious spirit who seeks to keep Charles in its clutches forever.

programme.title: A Haunting: Bewitched
programme.desc: All appears to be on track when Sidney moves his pregnant girlfriend into the home he shares with his mother. But their happiness is suddenly shattered when an ex-friend is trying to tear the couple apart through witchcraft and has endangered everyone.

programme.title: A Haunting: Grave Awakenings
programme.desc: When ghosts confront Zoe Dei, she makes the harrowing discovery that her home harbors a paranormal portal which has awakened her dormant ability as psychic medium, forcing her to learn how to live with her newfound ability to see the dead.

programme.title: A Haunting: Tunnel Of Death
programme.desc: Candace and John St. Clair explore a haunted tunnel with a gruesome history where slaves were buried alive. Stealthily, an uninvited guest follows them home. Attacked by the entity, they invite paranormal experts to investigate and cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Exorcism Of Cindy Sauer
programme.desc: Georgia single mother Cindy Sauer is finally getting back on her feet after the sudden death of her husband. But as she is recovering from her loss, nightmares and dark shadows haunt the family and mark the beginning of something far worse.

programme.title: A Haunting: Conjuring Evil
programme.desc: Harold and Cindy have found the perfect retreat in suburban Alaska for their family. But after their daughter begins to experiment in witchcraft, she unknowingly attracts the attention of a dark entity. Harold calls in experts to help reclaim the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Where Demons Dwell
programme.desc: Young David suffers from intense nightmares and is physically attacked by an invisible entity.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare In The Attic
programme.desc: The Fox family moves into a large old house in Lowell, Arkansas. Soon after, an angry ghost and demon begin to target the children, in their waking hours and in their dreams. The Fox family turns to a psychic, who confirms their worst nightmares.

programme.title: A Haunting: Untouchable
programme.desc: After her mother, Linda, returns from a routine overseas trip to India, Kara Dravis begins experiencing unexplained and terrifying events in their home. Linda and Kara turn to a clairvoyant in hopes she can find a resolution to the haunting.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Unleashed
programme.desc: Soon after Randy recites an incantation from a book on witchcraft, a growling monster appears.

programme.title: A Haunting: Conjuring Evil
programme.desc: Harold and Cindy have found the perfect retreat in suburban Alaska for their family. But after their daughter begins to experiment in witchcraft, she unknowingly attracts the attention of a dark entity. Harold calls in experts to help reclaim the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ashes To Evil
programme.desc: Soon after moving in a large apartment in Hampton, Tennessee, Amelia’s family can’t shake the feeling that they are not alone. An evil entity lurks in their dream home and is targeting family members. They turn to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After authorities finally identify the prolific Green River Killer, a cat-and-mouse game ensues to get inside his mind and have him lead them to the remains of other missing women.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a schoolteacher is gunned down in public, a known felon's DNA and phone records link him to the crime. After investigators arrest the man, they discover the real killer might actually be someone else entirely.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: In 1981, a mother vanishes from the Hernando woods and the case goes cold. Thirty-three years later, local detectives reopen the investigation, only to discover that getting a confession may be the only way to solve the case.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When US marine veteran Darrell Blagg is found shot dead outside his New Mexico home, a lucky break leads detectives to suspect his wife has links to the murderer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in her home, police aren't sure if it's an accident or a murder until they receive an unexpected phone call, from an unexpected person.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Almost a decade after Californian student Lynsie Ekelund went missing, detectives call the main suspect's bluff when they find human remains at the construction site he worked at.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Detectives have a brutal case on their hands when a beloved community member is killed and a part of his body is apparently taken as a souvenir by the murderer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A community bands together to search for a missing woman. The police are unable to solve the case, until they speak to her husband's close friend and learn some startling information.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After the naked body of an Ohio State senior is found, investigators bring in a suspect for questioning. They play a dangerous game of give and take, hoping to get the truth and bring justice to the victim and her family.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After the naked body of an Ohio State senior is found, investigators bring in a suspect for questioning. They play a dangerous game of give and take, hoping to get the truth and bring justice to the victim and her family.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Kathy Lujan, a married mother of two young boys, is believed to have run away with one of her lovers. Detective Rosie Rodriguez chases a trail of evidence and suspects that reveal the truth about Kathy's whereabouts.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When Kim Allen is found murdered in her home, her estranged and abusive husband is the likely suspect. A risky bluff by detectives takes the case in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A crazed cab driver goes on a seven-hour shooting spree, killing six people and critically injuring two.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a schoolteacher is gunned down in public, a known felon's DNA and phone records link him to the crime. After investigators arrest the man, they discover the real killer might actually be someone else entirely.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Detectives investigating the disappearance of a woman agree a plea deal with the main suspect, her ex-husband. When he leads them to her body, they are faced with a horrific scene.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Detectives grill the wife of a man found shot dead on his Iowa farm after they discover she had an affair with one of his friends. Can they pressurise the pair to tell the truth?

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Devoted mother Heather Strong disappears, leaving her estranged husband Josh to care for her two children, as he also falls under suspicion.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A community bands together to search for a missing woman. The police are unable to solve the case, until they speak to her husband's close friend and learn some startling information.

programme.title: The Dark Man
programme.desc: An actress becomes the quarry of a killer when he discovers she was an eyewitness to the double murders he committed.

programme.title: Eight O'Clock Walk
programme.desc: Young, inexperienced lawyer Peter Tanner must defend a cab driver who is accused of murdering a young girl, but complications arise when the prosecuting lawyer is Peter's own father.

programme.title: Hunted
programme.desc: An unusual relationship develops between a fugitive killer and a runaway orphan on an odyssey across England.

programme.title: Nowhere to Go
programme.desc: Paul Gregory is sprung from jail in London by his accomplice. A series of accidents and double-crosses sends Gregory spinning through London's criminal underworld.

programme.title: Yield to the Night
programme.desc: A young woman who has been abused and taken advantage of by all the men in her life, finally finds a man she believes truly loves her. However, she snaps when she finds out that he too is cheating on her.

programme.title: The Hornet's Nest
programme.desc: Journalists Mike and Carlos Boettcher follow North American troops during nine harrowing days of combat in Afghanistan.

programme.title: One Good Turn
programme.desc: A promise that an orphan will receive a model car leads to zany adventures.

programme.title: One Way Out
programme.desc: A policeman risks his career when he accepts a bribe to keep his daughter from being implicated in a robbery.

programme.title: The Hideout
programme.desc: An insurance investigator has a chance encounter with the sister of a fur dealer and soon finds himself embroiled in intrigue involving a case filled with cash as well as a potential outbreak of anthrax.

programme.title: The Embezzler
programme.desc: A quiet, respectable, henpecked bank cashier learns that he has only a few years left to live. He decides to embezzle money from the bank where he works and enjoy the rest of his days in South America.

programme.title: The Constant Husband
programme.desc: An Englishman wakes in a hotel bedroom suffering from amnesia and sets out to find his identity. He tracks down his wife but soon learns that the job she saw him leave for every morning did not exist.

programme.title: That Hamilton Woman
programme.desc: The ill-fated romance of Horatio Lord Nelson and Emma Hamilton, wife of the British Ambassador to Naples. Made during WWII, the film was clearly meant to raise the morale of British audiences and was said to have been Churchill's favourite film.

programme.title: The Maury Show: It's Spring... Change Your Look!
programme.desc: All these people need a makeover and today is the day it will happen - changes so drastic their families won't even recognize them. Popular radio host Egypt joins us today!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Daughter Sleep With My Man?
programme.desc: The guests on today’s MAURY have secrets to reveal, but will they regret ever bringing them up? Relationships are on the line. Hearts may be broken. Can these couples survive the secrets that threaten to tear them apart? Find out on today’s MAURY!
programme.sub-title: Did My Daughter Sleep With My Man?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 10 Moms. 12 Kids. Who’s The Dad? Part 1
programme.desc: We’ve got so much paternity action we can’t fit it all in one show. “You Are the Father” could be the sweetest words these men could ever hear. Will the results be make our guest cheer or tear?
programme.sub-title: 10 Moms. 12 Kids. Who’s The Dad? Part 1

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Had a Threesome…Who's My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Rhonda is positive that John is the father of her child. Even John’s mother agrees with her! Then, Kim and Heather used to be best friends. But that was before Rick left her for Heather. But Kim is sure that Rick fathered her baby. What is the truth?
programme.sub-title: I Had a Threesome…Who's My Baby's Dad?

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Jazmin and Erica's friendship takes a turn for the worse when Jazmin's swimwear inventory goes MIA; Nicole is determined to catch her husband cheating by keeping track of his every move.
programme.sub-title: My Best Friend Stole from Me / Unlock The Phone: 20 Years of Lies?

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Tray has second thoughts about marrying Olivia after discovering inappropriate text messages between her and men from her past; Marena believes that her boyfriend Kaseem has commitment issues.
programme.sub-title: I Want a Family, Marry Me / Unlock The Phone: Give Me a Title

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Patrick suspects La Joy of cheating with her best friend Tony, but she denies it. Karamo investigates. Meanwhile, Airreyonna doubts her on-and-off boyfriend Teair, who admits to past betrayals.
programme.sub-title: Unlock: Are You Sleeping With Your Bff?! / Unlock: Stop Getting Others Pregnant

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: On Karamo, Gerri feels disrespected by her children and seeks help to understand why. Meanwhile, William, 26 years older than his fiancé China, faces her doubts about his fidelity and her demand to unlock his phone before marriage.
programme.sub-title: Where Did I Go Wrong With My Kids? / Unlock: Can We Make It Down The Aisle?

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Samonia wants to mend her friendship with Leslie after criticizing her partners. Meanwhile, Kalondra left her husband Anthony due to lies, but he's trying to win her back. Karamo helps by unlocking both their phones to uncover the truth.
programme.sub-title: Unlock The Truth: He's A Jailbird / Unlock: 14 Years Of Marriage Lies?

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Michael is suing Brian for the cost to bail him out of jail but Brian said it was his girlfriend who called for help.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Michael is suing Brian for the cost to bail him out of jail but Brian said it was his girlfriend who called for help.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Trudy is suing bar owner Jefferey for damages because she claims a drunk patron plowed into her parked car.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: After moving in together, Mackie is suing Joel for unlawfully locking her out.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Tania is suing her child's father for not reimbursing her for a cruise his daughter from another woman came on.

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Husband or Lover Father My Kids?
programme.desc: Is Jesus the father of Laicie’s baby? Dusti says he’s gay and sex with Kayla was an “experiment”, but did he father her child? Is Rick or Jesse the father of Jolene’s baby?
programme.sub-title: Did My Husband or Lover Father My Kids?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Sister Sleeping With My Man?
programme.desc: Sherry has a shocking secret to tell her boyfriend. But the secret involves his childhood best friend. Jen says that her husband is a cheater and has proof! Will these relationships survive?
programme.sub-title: Is My Sister Sleeping With My Man?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated... Our Kids May Not Be Yours!
programme.desc: Two steaming grandmothers want to sort out their children's paternity mystery. Then, Ben is sure that Angela's child is his. Teen mom Melissa wants Izzy to admit he's the dad and support her!
programme.sub-title: I Cheated... Our Kids May Not Be Yours!

programme.title: The Maury Show: They're Back: Feuding Family Updates!
programme.desc: Some of our wildest guests return to give us some updates. Did the DNA results force these denying dads to step up? Did the lie detector results force these cheaters to become faithful?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated With Your Family and 97 Women
programme.desc: These women are sure their lovers are cheating. Will these men be able to talk their way out of being busted on hidden camera?
programme.sub-title: I Cheated With Your Family and 97 Women

programme.title: The Maury Show: 5 Babies 5 DNA Tests. Is He The Father?
programme.desc: Today on Maury, we've got steaming mad mommas and daddies in denial. But could some of these men be right? What if they really aren't the father? Only Maury has the answers!
programme.sub-title: 5 Babies 5 DNA Tests. Is He The Father?

programme.title: The Maury Show: We'll Prove You're My Baby's Dad!
programme.desc: Kreisha and Jonathan's mom wants to prove to him that he fathered her baby. Plus, Brooke and Wade's relationship began as a teenage romance, but ends with a paternity test!
programme.sub-title: We'll Prove You're My Baby's Dad!

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: A mail lorry crashes on a London street and a bashed-up Audi is wedged in a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: An overnight frost makes a road sweeper slide into a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: A trailer catches fire and a lorry smashes into a tree.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: A lorry grounded; a trucked wedged in mud; a truck crashes into a low bridge.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: A tractor topples into a ditch; a lorry is trapped in mud; a unit loses its grip on ice.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
